instructions: Use AGENTS.md as workflow source of truth. Treat this repo as a pnpm TypeScript monorepo. Keep packages/core framework-neutral and flag coupling to framework/runtime-specific APIs. For changes affecting public behavior, JSON schema, OpenSpec-backed contracts, package boundaries, or release/install workflow, require matching OpenSpec change evidence under openspec/ before approval. Require evidence that pnpm lint, pnpm test, and pnpm typecheck passed.
